query:
CREATE TABLE appeals (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  parcelId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  countyName VARCHAR(100),
  appealDate DATE NOT NULL,
  appealType VARCHAR(50),
  currentAssessedValue INT,
  requestedAssessedValue INT,
  finalAssessedValue INT,
  status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'pending',
  outcome VARCHAR(50),
  notes TEXT,
  createdBy INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX appeal_parcelid_idx (parcelId),
  INDEX appeal_county_idx (countyName),
  INDEX appeal_status_idx (status)
);
